title: Lorenzo Da Ponte's Libretti — TEI Editions (Cinna, Il Ricco d'un giorno, Il Talismano)
description: TEI P5 digital editions of three drammi per musica by Lorenzo Da Ponte (1749–1838): Cinna (London, 1798), Il Ricco d'un giorno (Vienna, 1784), and Il Talismano (Vienna, 1788). Each libretto is encoded from a single printed witness and forms part of the Da Ponte Libretti digital scholarly edition. The dataset bundles the encoded texts with the project's TEI encoding model (ODD + Schematron) for reuse and validation.

creators.name: Pacchin, Marta
